ddt:Target.Name: Left DCM X95 PIEB2 v2.1
ddt:Target.Description:
Driver door control module for X95
Version 2.1 diffusée au ROP: - mise à jour des DTC - corrections - précisions
philippe.sene@renault.com
Sce 65620
tél. 01 76 85 77 63

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Driver mirrors motors in open load
Passenger mirrors motors in open load

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Piece No
Data.Comment: Reference du boitier programme (hard + soft + calib)

Data.Name: WindowsRightRearDown
Data.Comment: Rear Right Window Lift Down switch

Data.Name: WindowsLeftRearDown
Data.Comment: Rear Left Window Lift Down switch

Data.Name: WindowsLeftRearUp
Data.Comment: Rear Left Window Lift Up switch

Item.Text: 0 Vehicle not locked from the outside by the customer NOT CAR SECURE
1 Vehicle locked from the outside by the customer CAR SECURE
0 No driver door unlock is requested
0 No driver door lock is requested
00 No rear function inhibition indicator switch order
01 Rear function inhibition indicator switch OFF
10 Rear function inhibition indicator switch ON
00 No passenger window lift action requested
11 Short drop passenger window lift requested
00 No driver window lift action requested
11 Short drop driver window lift requested
00 Internal lighting in OFF mode requested
01 Internal lighting in rheostated mode requested
10 Internal lighting in ON mode requested
001 Manuel UP passenger window lift action requested
010 Manuel DOWN passenger window lift action requested
011 Passenger window lift Stop action requested
101 Express UP passenger window lift action requested
110 Express DOWN passenger window lift action requested

Data.Name: RearRightWindowLiftActionReq
Data.Comment: CAN Rear Right Window Lift command

Item.Text: 001 Manuel UP Rear Right window lift action requested
010 Manuel DOWN Rear Right window lift action requested
011 Rear Right window lift Stop action requested
101 Express UP Rear Right window lift action requested
110 Express DOWN Rear Right window lift action requested

Data.Name: RearLeftWindowLiftActionReq
Data.Comment: CAN Rear Left Window Lift command

Item.Text: 001 Manuel UP Rear Left window lift action requested
010 Manuel DOWN Rear Left window lift action requested
011 Rear Left window lift Stop action requested
101 Express UP Rear Left window lift action requested
110 Express DOWN Rear Left window lift action requested

Data.Name: NightRheostatedLightMaxPercent
Data.Comment: CAN Night Rheostated Light Maw Percent value

Data.Name: OutputTemporaryControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Data.Name: RearWindowsSwitchesEnable
Data.Comment: Child Lock Rear Window Lift Enable state

Data.Name: Config Mirror adjustment running timeout
Data.Comment: Config Mirror adjustment running / folding timeouts

Data.Name: Config DCM position
Data.Comment: Config DCM postion and car direction

Item.Text: 0000 Bad set up or first set up by MM
0001 Bad set up or first set up by MM
0010 Bad set up or first set up by MM
0011 Bad set up or first set up by MM
1100 Bad set up or first set up by MM
1101 Bad set up or first set up by MM
1110 Bad set up or first set up by MM
1111 Bad set up or first set up by MM
00 Only fault reports in cranking or sleeping phase
01 All faults reports not related to APC are enabled
11 Unavailable / All faults reports are enabled

Data.Name: WindowsRightRearUp
Data.Comment: Rear Right Window Lift Up switch

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: Start Diagnostic Session
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: Output Control
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: RecuperationDTC
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Label.Text: Warning, ECU reset is nedded after each EEPROM writting parameter set to be apply by the SW
Start Routine No Sleep Mode (Only for test bench)
